blocks.body: Passive with Modals - learn how the passive state is formed with modal verbs: can, could, must, should, may, might. Formula: modal + be + V3.

{ "title": "9. Short summary", "items": [ "Formula: modal + be + V3. be is always in the infinitive WITHOUT to.", "can/could be + V3 — possibility, ability.", "must/have to be + V3 — necessity, obligation.", "should/ought to be + V3 — recommendation, advice.", "may/might be + V3 — probability, permission.", "Question: Modal + S + be + V3?", "Objection: modal + not + be + V3." ] }
